title: The iPad Kid Mod
description:
i have no idea why i made this but its funny

and im not affiliated with apple
body:
Hello guys! this mod is so beautiful! you need to like this! yay! 

This is how the mod works.

You can craft an iPad although ridicoulously expensive.
You can also craft the iPad Kid's spawn egg.
The iPad is very powerful, dealing 200 damage per hit.
The iPad Kid ridicoulously fast, but doesn't deal much damage.

This is my first mod!
